Video.summary: Tonight, Atlanta is the site of hard-driving freestyle! This is Monster Jam from the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA during Monster Jam's 2001 season.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the HHH Metrodome on February 19, 2005.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Georgia Dome, on January 8, 2005.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam at the HHH Metrodome in Minneapolis, MN.
Video.title: HHH Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Don't miss all the freestyle action from Raymond James Stadium on January 17, 2014.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee, WI for more Monster Jam fun in Arena Series in 30!
Video.title: Fiserv Forum - Milwaukee, WI

Video.summary: Monster Jam rocks the crowd at NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: It's a jam-packed night in Houston- watch the best of the best compete with racing action from Reliant Stadium, on February 5, 2005.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East slip-slides its way into Gillette Stadium as Bryce Kenny looks to launch Great Clips Mohawk Warrior to back-to-back freestyle wins, as Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga hopes his competitors don’t rain on his parade to a sixth series title.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA

Video.summary: Buckle up, hold on tight, and don't miss Monster Jam's freestyle action from Reliant Stadium, on February 5, 2005.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Things are heating up as Monster Jam's 2001 season heads to the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA! It's time for racing action from your favorite trucks and drivers.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Hang on tight! Monster Jam's 2006 season continues with racing action from Raymond James Stadium, on January 21, 2006.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2006 season starts with a bang in Montreal at the Olympic Stadium! Don't miss your favorite trucks and drivers as they compete in racing challenges.
Video.title: Olympic Stadium - Montreal, Quebec - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season continues at Everbank Field in Jacksonville, FL with even more racing and freestyle action!
Video.title: Everbank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: The Monster Jam Path of Destruction rolls into the city of brotherly love at Lincoln Financial Field in Philadelphia, PA.
Video.title: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena Series in 25 continues at the Huntington Center in Toledo, OH.
Video.title: Huntington Center - Toledo, OH

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena Series in 25 continues with round 19 at PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh, PA.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

World Finals XIV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1
World Finals XIV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1

Video.summary: Watch this 2019 Monster Jam Rewind of the World Finals Freestyle from Orlando, FL!
Video.title: World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle
World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle
World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Arena in 30 returns to the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ for round 5.
Video.title: Prudential Center - Newark, NJ

Video.summary: The 2026 Monster Jam season ignites at Camping World Stadium in Orlando, launching the high-stakes Stadium Championship Series East. This pulse-pounding episode features a mix of decorated veterans and hungry rising stars competing in head-to-head JCB Racing, a technical Skills Challenge, and a spectacular Freestyle finale. Witness the high-intensity return of Joe "Freestyle" Foley to the wheel of El Toro Loco and the highly anticipated stadium debut of Jamie Sullivan in Sparkle Smash. As drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the limit through massive air and technical saves, every point earned is a step closer to the ultimate goal: World Finals 25.
Video.title: Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Watch Monster Jam World Finals freestyle action with drivers like Rihanna Mahan, Lindsay Reed, Camden Murphy, Ryan Anderson, and more.
Video.title: Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation

Image.alt: Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation
Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation
Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation

Video.summary: GET READY TO JAM! This EPIC compilation packs the BEST Monster Jam songs AND cartoon adventures all in one place! Rock out to massive hits like the official Monster Jam Theme Song and the awesome Zombie Fan Music Video. Then, buckle up for non-stop action with Grave Digger, Max-D, and your favorite trucks in the unforgettable Monster Jam Adventures animated series!
Video.title: Monster Jam Song And Cartoon Kids Compilation

Image.alt: Monster Jam Song And Cartoon Kids Compilation
Monster Jam Song And Cartoon Kids Compilation
Monster Jam Song And Cartoon Kids Compilation

Video.summary: Even when there's rain or mud, these monster trucks bring their A-Game. Get down and dirty with this compilation of muddy Monster Jam trucks! AND - Witness some of the best freestyles ever to hit the World Finals field from 2000 to 2011.
Video.title: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Image.alt: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Video.summary: Feel the ground shake as the 2026 Monster Jam season kicks off with a high-octane battle in Salt Lake City. Watch legendary icons like Grave Digger and Megalodon go head-to-head against reigning World Finals champion Blake Granger in Monster Mutt Dalmatian and Armando Castro, who is celebrating 25 years of El Toro Loco. From the precision of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge to the adrenaline-fueled chaos of a Freestyle finale packed with backflips and drifting, these elite athletes push 12,000-pound machines to their absolute limits.
Video.title: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: High-speed brackets and split-second decisions define this Monster Jam Fast Track showdown as elite drivers push their trucks to the limit in racing and skills competition. Tyler Menninga’s Grave Digger sets the tone early, but relentless pressure from Zombie, El Toro Loco, Megalodon, and Vendetta turns every run into a must-win moment. Clean launches, aggressive cornering, and costly mistakes reshape the leaderboard as rivals trade momentum. With points on the line and no room for error, this episode delivers pure Monster Jam intensity from start to finish.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Tune in LIVE as Monster Jam rolls into Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026
Video.title: LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026

Image.alt: LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026
